title: Common Data Format — Line Schema
description: Validates a single line in a CDF JSON Lines file. Each line must be either a Header record (line 1) or an Account record (lines 2+), distinguished by the recordType discriminator field.

header.title: Common Data Format — File Header
header.description: The first record in a CDF JSON Lines file. Carries reporting period and portfolio metadata that applies to all subsequent account records in the file. Processors should read this record first, then apply its context to all following lines.

recordType.title: Record Type
recordType.description: Discriminator field identifying this as a file header record.

cdfVersion.title: CDF Version
cdfVersion.description: Version of the Common Data Format this file conforms to.

reportingStartDate.title: Reporting Start Date
reportingStartDate.description: Start of the reporting period (inclusive), in YYYY-MM-DD format.

reportingEndDate.title: Reporting End Date
reportingEndDate.description: End of the reporting period (inclusive), in YYYY-MM-DD format.

portfolioId.title: Portfolio ID
portfolioId.description: Identifier for the lender portfolio. Lowercase kebab-case, prefixed with the reporting institution's slug to avoid collisions across independently-operated systems. Unique within the context of the reporting institution. Examples: 'farringdon-mortgages', 'farringdon-unsecured'.

recordCount.title: Record Count
recordCount.description: Total number of account records in this file, excluding the header.

account.title: Common Data Format — Account Record
account.description: A single consumer credit account record in a CDF JSON Lines file. Must be preceded by a Header record which carries the reporting period and portfolio context for all records in the file.

recordType.title: Record Type
recordType.description: Discriminator field identifying this as an account data record.

accountId.title: Account ID
accountId.description: Unique identifier for the credit account within the lender's system. Alphanumeric characters and hyphens only.

accountIdChange.title: Account ID Change
accountIdChange.description: Updated account identifier, provided when the accountId for this account has changed. Processors should replace the previous accountId with this value. Same format as accountId.

accountType.title: Account Type
accountType.description: The category of credit product. Determines which fields are applicable and how balances and payments are interpreted.

startDate.title: Start Date
startDate.description: The date the account was opened. In YYYY-MM-DD format.

closeDate.title: Close Date
closeDate.description: The date the account was closed. In YYYY-MM-DD format. Omit if the account is still open.

daysPastDue.title: Days Past Due
daysPastDue.description: Number of days the account is past due. Required when status is Delinquent1 through Delinquent6.

repayment.title: Repayment Amount
repayment.description: Scheduled repayment amount per period in GBP. At most 2 decimal places by convention.

repaymentPeriod.title: Repayment Period
repaymentPeriod.description: Total number of repayment periods at origination — not the number of periods remaining. Reflects the full agreement term.

startBalance.title: Start Balance
startBalance.description: Total balance in GBP at the time the account was opened. At most 2 decimal places by convention.

currentBalance.title: Current Balance
currentBalance.description: Total outstanding balance in GBP at the point of reporting.

paymentFrequency.title: Payment Frequency
paymentFrequency.description: How often scheduled repayments are made.

accountSubtype.title: Account Subtype
accountSubtype.description: Further classification of the account within its type.

creditLimit.title: Credit Limit
creditLimit.description: Maximum credit available on the account in GBP. Required when accountType is 'CreditCard', 'ChargeCard', or 'Budget'; omit for all other account types. At most 2 decimal places by convention.

cashAdvances.title: Cash Advances
cashAdvances.description: Total value of cash advances taken on the account in GBP. Applies to CreditCard, ChargeCard, and Budget accounts only. At most 2 decimal places by convention.

cashAdvancesCount.title: Cash Advances Count
cashAdvancesCount.description: Number of cash advance transactions on the account. Applies to CreditCard, ChargeCard, and Budget accounts only.

minimumPayment.title: Minimum Payment
minimumPayment.description: Minimum payment due in GBP. Required on CreditCard accounts. At most 2 decimal places by convention.

flags.title: Flags
flags.description: Optional markers indicating special conditions on the account. Multiple flags may be applied simultaneously. Omit the field entirely if no flags apply.

person.title: Person
person.description: The individual associated with the credit account. First name, last name, and date of birth are mandatory.

lastName.title: Last Name
lastName.description: Family name / surname. Mandatory. Minimum 2 characters.

dob.title: Date of Birth
dob.description: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format. Mandatory.

email.title: Email Address
email.description: Email address of the account holder. Optional.

phone.title: Phone Number
phone.description: Phone number in E.164 format with UK country code, digits only, e.g. '447911123456'. Optional.

address.title: Address
address.description: UK residential address. line1 and postalCode are required.

subBuilding.title: Sub-Building
subBuilding.description: Sub-unit within a building, e.g. 'Flat 3', 'Unit B'. Optional.

buildingName.title: Building Name
buildingName.description: Named building, e.g. 'Rose Cottage', 'Acacia House'. Optional.

buildingNumber.title: Building Number
buildingNumber.description: Street number as a string to accommodate values like '5A'. Optional.

line1.title: Line 1
line1.description: Primary street address line, e.g. 'Main Street'. Required.

line2.title: Line 2
line2.description: Secondary address line, e.g. a locality or district. Optional.

postalCode.title: Postal Code
postalCode.description: UK postcode including the internal space, e.g. 'NG8 1JD'. Required.

udprn.title: UDPRN
udprn.description: Royal Mail Unique Delivery Point Reference Number. 8-digit numeric string. Optional.
